headline: Super vs Grok

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Grok. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Grok

summary: A fair, practical comparison for people choosing between Super and Grok. Grok excels at real‑time X data, Heavy mode reasoning, and media generation. Super is purpose‑built for repeated computer‑use workflows—with personal agents that operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache—making it sharper and more cost‑efficient when the same tasks run again and again.
